name: Ops IQ
description: GCP resource monitoring and observability agent for the Stratova AI platform. Monitors Vertex AI quotas and usage limits, LLM token consumption per model, Cloud Monitoring time-series metrics (request counts, latency, error rates), and per-user chat interaction history via Firestore. Dynamically enables/disables monitoring modules without redeployment.

skills.name: Quota Monitoring
skills.description: List and inspect GCP service quota limits and preferences for aiplatform.googleapis.com and other services. Identifies quota headroom, fixed quotas, and pending increase requests.
skills.input: Natural language: 'What are our Vertex AI quota limits?', 'Are we close to any rate limits?', 'Show quota increase requests'
skills.output: quota_id, metric name, current limit, unit, headroom warnings for quotas at >80% utilisation
examples: What are our Vertex AI quota limits?
Are we close to any API rate limits?
Show all pending quota increase requests
Which quotas are fixed and cannot be increased?
Give me a quota headroom summary

skills.name: LLM Usage Metrics
skills.description: Query Cloud Monitoring time-series data for Vertex AI / Gemini usage: input and output token counts, request rates, server-side latency (p50/p95), and error rates. Broken down by model. Covers the publisher/online_serving metric family.
skills.input: Natural language: 'How many tokens did we use today?', 'What is the error rate on gemini-2.5-flash?', 'Show latency by model for the last 7 days'
skills.output: token counts (input/output/total) per model, request counts, latency percentiles in ms, error rate % with alerts
examples: How many tokens did we use in the last 24 hours?
Which model is consuming the most tokens?
What is the p95 latency for gemini-2.5-flash?
Are there any models with error rates above 1%?
Show me Agent Engine request counts for the last week

skills.name: Vertex AI Resource Inventory
skills.description: List all deployed Vertex AI Agent Engines (Reasoning Engines), online prediction endpoints, and deployed models. Returns state (ACTIVE/FAILED/UPDATING), timestamps, and configuration.
skills.input: Natural language: 'List all deployed agents', 'What endpoints do we have?', 'Is the Knowledge IQ agent running?'
skills.output: resource names, display names, states, create/update timestamps, deployed model details
examples: List all Vertex AI Agent Engine deployments
What is the state of each deployed agent?
Show all online prediction endpoints
List the models deployed to our endpoints
Give me a Vertex AI resource summary

skills.name: Per-User Usage Tracking
skills.description: Query Firestore for per-user and per-session LLM usage: token consumption, request counts, agents used, and chronological interaction history. Populated by the shared after_model_callback on opted-in agents.
skills.input: Natural language: 'How much has alice@stratova.ai used?', 'Who are the top 10 users by tokens?', 'Show me the last 20 interactions for Bob'
skills.output: total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, request_count, per_agent_breakdown, ranked user leaderboard, session event list
examples: How many tokens has abdul@stratova.ai used this week?
Show the top 10 users by token consumption in the last 30 days
Show the last 20 chat interactions for a specific user
Which agent is used the most across the platform?
Give me a per-agent usage breakdown for today

skills.name: Platform Health Overview
skills.description: Combined health summary covering quota headroom, token burn rate, request volume, error rate alerts, and Vertex AI resource states. Single-call overview for periodic health reports.
skills.input: Natural language: 'Platform health report', 'How is the platform doing?', 'Any anomalies today?'
skills.output: structured summary: anomalies | quotas | tokens | requests | resource inventory
examples: Give me a platform health report
Are there any anomalies or alerts right now?
How is our Vertex AI platform performing today?
Show me a combined metrics and quota summary
